description: Accounts in an orderly scribal hand on a bifolium whose folding and size is suggestive of the existence of a broader ledger (from which there is at least one other join: JRL SERIES C 6). Based on the paleography, the dating is likely 19th- or late-18th century. With the exception of a single, possibly related, note in Judaeo-Arabic on the recto the entirety of the document is in Arabic and the numerals are eastern Arabic. Many of the headings are organized by days of the week which encompass additional isolated entries that are designated by individuals' names. MCD.
description_he: חשבונות בכתב סופר מסודר על ביפוליו. תאריך: המאה ה-19 או סוף ה-18. מלבד פתק ביהודית-ערבית ברקטו, כל המסמך בערבית עם ספרות ערביות מזרחיות. הכותרות מאורגנות לפי ימות השבוע. MCD.
